abstract: A Halorubrum H3 strain was isolated from a water and silt sample from Burlinskoye Lake (Altai Krai, Russia, 53°8'19″N 78°24'27″E). According to 16S rRNA sequences, this strain is most closely related to Halorubrum saccharovorum. The completely sequenced and annotated genome is 3,282,373 bp and contains 3,237 genes.
title: Draft genome sequence of a halorubrum h3 strain isolated from the burlinskoye salt lake (altai krai, Russia).
